title: Senior DevOps Engineer
jd_text: Web3Remote: (HQ: London)£60k 90k Plexus is partnering with a fast-growing, well-funded Web3 startup specializing in real-time risk detection and threat prevention. Their platform helps Crypto funds, protocols, and business stay ahead of security threats. By processing billions of blockchain events across multiple chains, they leverage big data, AI, and advanced monitoring to secure digital assets in real time.They are looking for a Senior DevOps Engineer to make a meaningful impact in the early stages of product development, contributing and growing alongside some of the best engineers in the industry.RoleDesign, implement, and manage scalable cloud infrastructure on AWS and GCP. Develop and maintain CI/CD pipelines to enable fast and reliable software releases.Assess and integrate tools to streamline Development and Operations workflows.Manage security best practices using IAM roles, security groups, and compliance standards. RequirementsExperience with CI/CD process and tools (GitHub Actions is a bonus).Hands-on experience with AWS/GCP and Kubernetes.Experience with Infrastructure as Code tools like Terraform. Experience in the Crypto/Web3 space.Benefits£60k 90kEquity (negotiable) Flexible Holiday Allowance BonusIf youre interested, please click on the Easy Apply.LNKD1_UKTJ
tech_raw: Web3, AI, AWS, GCP, Kubernetes, Terraform, Crypto, Web3, CI/CD, GitHub Actions
